title: Trouble in Sundown
writer: Oliver Drake, Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan
actors: George O'Brien, Rosalind Keith, Ray Whitley
plot: The bank has been robbed, the night watchman killed and the safe opened. The townspeople want John as he was the only one with the combination. Clint gets John out of town but before the mob turns ugly but the deputy is shot when ...
